title: eremopyrum distans
intro: Eremopyrum distans, also known as wheat grass, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the grass family (Poaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial for reducing the risk of chronic diseases such as cancer and heart disease. The health benefits of Eremopyrum distans include improving digestion, boosting the immune system, and acting as an antibacterial agent. The herbal preparations of Eremopyrum distans include tea, juice, and powder, which can be consumed fresh or dried, and are often used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine.
